problem id: cd93713c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHR(7)

examples:
  11110111 -> 00000000
  00010101 -> 00000000
  10000000 -> 00000000
  10100111 -> 00000000
  00111001 -> 00000000
  11001000 -> 00000001
  01101111 -> 00000000
  10011010 -> 00000001

query: 01010111
predicted answer: 00000000
